Select Theme

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    Action
     
    Address
    Address.java - JPA class to represent an Address.
    AddressForm
    Reusable address sub-form shared by CompanyView, DepartmentView and UserView (every aggregate that carries an Address).
    AddressRepository
     
    ApiError
     
    AuditorAwareImpl
     
    AuthorizationService
     
    Blackboard
    A blackboard holds the tasks of a single Project.
    BlackboardRepository
     
    BpmnDefinitionReader
    Reads what the platform needs to know out of a BPMN file: its process key and name.
    BpmnDefinitionReader.BpmnDefinitionInfo
    What a BPMN file tells us about the process it defines.
    CancelProcessInstanceRequest
    Why a process instance was cancelled.
    Company
    JPA entity to represent a Company.
    CompanyController
     
    CompanyRepository
     
    CompanyService
     
    CompanyView
    First real administration view: a master-detail CRUD screen for Company.
    CurrentUser
    UI-side counterpart of the REST WebArgumentResolver pattern: resolves the logged-in PUser for Vaadin views.
    CurrentUserResolver
    Central bridge between Spring Security Authentication and the domain entity PUser.
    DashboardView
    Authenticated landing page of the admin GUI: greets the logged-in user.
    DataInitializerConfig
     
    Department
    JPA entity to represent a Department of a Company.
    DepartmentController
     
    DepartmentRepository
     
    DepartmentService
     
    DepartmentView
    Master-detail CRUD screen for Department.
    DiscoveryMessage
    Immutable representation of a device's MQTT DISCOVERY payload, by which a device announces (self-registers) itself and declares its transports and controllable commands.
    DiscoveryMessage.CommandSpec
    A single controllable command declared by the device.
    DiscoveryMessage.Control
    The transports a device offers.
    DiscoveryMessage.MqttControl
    MQTT transport coordinates.
    DiscoveryMessage.ParameterSpec
    A single parameter of a DiscoveryMessage.CommandSpec.
    DiscoveryMessage.RestControl
    REST transport coordinates.
    Document
    JPA entity to represent a document.
    DocumentDeletionEvent
    Domain event raised by DocumentService before a document is removed, so that everything referencing it can clean up — or object.
    DocumentGroup
    JPA entity to represent a Directory of documents within a department.
    DocumentGroupRepository
    Repository for DocumentGroup entities (directories).
    DocumentGroupRestController
     
    DocumentHistoryDTO
     
    DocumentInfo
    JPA entity to represent a reference to a Document and it's history.
    DocumentInfoRepository
     
    DocumentRepository
     
    DocumentRestController
     
    DocumentService
     
    DocumentService.DocumentDownload
    Detached download payload of a document's current version (filename, MIME type, raw bytes).
    DocumentSummaryDTO
     
    DocumentsView
    Admin document screen — deliberately view-only plus delete.
    GlobalExceptionHandler
     
    GroupsView
    Master-detail CRUD screen for the group layer directly beneath a Department: ResourceGroups and DocumentGroups.
    InboundResourceEventHandler
    Processes inbound MQTT messages (device → system) from the mqttInboundChannel.
    InitializationService
     
    JpaConfig
     
    KeycloakSecurityConfig
     
    LoginView
    Login screen for the Vaadin admin GUI.
    MainLayout
    Application shell for the admin GUI: a title bar with a logout button and a navigation drawer.
    MqttCommand
    A control command a device declared during MQTT discovery (e.g.
    MqttCommandParameter
    A single parameter of an MqttCommand, declared by a device during discovery.
    MqttDiscoveryService
    Registers MQTT devices that announce themselves via a DISCOVERY message and keeps their resource representation up to date.
    MqttIntegrationConfig
    Declarative Spring Integration wiring for MQTT.
    MqttParameterType
    Value type of an MqttCommandParameter as declared by a device during MQTT discovery.
    MqttProperties
    Type-safe MQTT configuration, bound to the prefix prioritize.mqtt.
    MqttResourceControlAdapter
    ResourceControlAdapter implementation for MQTT-controlled resources.
    NameValueEntry
    Represents MQTT IoT data (name-value pairs).
    NfcScanBroadcast
    Wire format of an NFC scan broadcast on the MQTT status channel.
    NfcScanMqttBridge
    Broadcasts scan events over MQTT so devices and dashboards see tag scans (tracking started/stopped, counter, check-in) live.
    NfcScannedEvent
    Domain event raised by NfcUnitService.scan(String, PUser) once a tag scan has been processed.
    NfcUnit
    A physical NFC tag mounted on a Resource.
    NfcUnit.NfcUnitType
    Semantics of a tag; determines what a scan does.
    NfcUnitController
    REST endpoints for NFC tags and scans.
    NfcUnitController.NfcUnitRequest
    Request body for registering a tag.
    NfcUnitRepository
     
    NfcUnitService
    Manages NFC tags mounted on resources and dispatches scans.
    NfcUnitService.NfcUnitData
    Editable tag fields, decoupling the service from HTTP DTOs.
    NfcUnitService.ScanResult
    Outcome of a scan, describing what the tag triggered.
    OpenApiConfig
     
    PActor
    PActor is the base for all entities that can actively work on tasks (e.g. persons or machines).
    PActorRepository
    Polymorphic repository over the PActor hierarchy.
    PasswordConfig
     
    PAuthorizedObject
    Interface to indicate that the implementing JPA entity is a protected resource.
    PermissionRecord
     
    PermissionRecordRepository
     
    PermissionRecordService
    CRUD service for standalone PermissionRecords (the C/R/U/D + target definition of a single permission).
    PObject
    Base class for all persistent objects in the system.
    PrioritizeApplication
     
    ProcessDefinition
    A BPMN process definition known to the platform, carried by a DocumentInfo of the documents subsystem.
    ProcessDefinitionController
    REST API for BPMN process definitions (ProcessDefinitionService).
    ProcessDefinitionDocumentCleanup
    Decides what happens to a ProcessDefinition when the document carrying its BPMN is deleted.
    ProcessDefinitionDTO
    Flat, transport-safe view of a ProcessDefinition.
    ProcessDefinitionRepository
    Repository for ProcessDefinitions.
    ProcessDefinitionService
    Registry of the BPMN process definitions the platform knows about.
    ProcessDefinitionStartupReport
    Reports, once at startup, which process definitions the engine answers to that the registry does not know about.
    ProcessDefinitionState
    Lifecycle of a ProcessDefinition.
    ProcessInstanceController
    REST API for BPMN process instances (ProcessInstanceService).
    ProcessInstanceDTO
    Flat view of one running or finished BPMN process instance, as far as the platform cares about it: what it was started from, what it belongs to, and whether it is still going.
    ProcessInstanceService
    Starts BPMN process instances for a project or one of its tasks — the point where the engine actually begins to run something.
    Project
    A project groups a team of members, assigned resources and documents around a shared goal, managed by a single manager.
    ProjectController
    REST endpoints for projects.
    ProjectController.ProjectRequest
    Request body for creating/updating a project.
    ProjectDeletionEvent
    Domain event raised by ProjectService before a project row is removed, so that everything referencing it can be cleaned up first.
    ProjectGoal
    A target a Project pursues.
    ProjectGoalController
    REST endpoints for a project's goals and derived progress.
    ProjectGoalController.GoalRequest
    Request body for creating/updating a goal.
    ProjectGoalProperty
    Descriptive property of a ProjectGoal, e.g. a numeric target range or a required document tag.
    ProjectGoalPropertyDocument
    A ProjectGoalProperty requiring a document carrying a given tag.
    ProjectGoalPropertyNumeric
    A ProjectGoalProperty describing a numeric target range (e.g. a value expected between min and max).
    ProjectGoalRepository
     
    ProjectGoalService
    Manages the goals of a project and derives progress from them.
    ProjectGoalService.GoalData
    Editable goal fields, decoupling the service from HTTP DTOs.
    ProjectGoalService.GoalProgress
    Completion of a single goal; percentage is null without counting tasks.
    ProjectGoalService.ProjectProgress
    Overall project progress; overallPercentage is null when undefined.
    ProjectRepository
     
    ProjectService
    Manages projects and their team, resources and documents.
    ProjectService.ProjectData
    Immutable set of editable project fields, decoupling the service from HTTP DTOs.
    PUser
     
    PUser.Gender
     
    Resource
    JPA entity to represent a Resource.
    ResourceCommandFailedException
    Thrown when a control command could be delivered to a device, but the device was unreachable or responded with an error (connection refused, timeout, HTTP 4xx/5xx).
    ResourceCommandMessage
    JSON wire format for a control command sent to a resource.
    ResourceControlAdapter
    Port (hexagonal architecture) for the outbound control of a Resource.
    ResourceController
     
    ResourceController.ResourceCommandRequest
    Request body for a control command.
    ResourceController.ResourceValueRequest
    Request body for a telemetry ingest.
    ResourceControlService
    Central entry point for controlling resources.
    ResourceGroup
     
    ResourceGroupRepository
    Repository for ResourceGroup entities.
    ResourceOfflineException
    Thrown when a control command cannot be delivered because the resource has no reachable transport (e.g. the MQTT resource is offline and has no REST endpoint of its own).
    ResourceRepository
     
    ResourceReservation
     
    ResourceReservationDTO
    A single reservation of a resource for the admin occupancy overview (display + cancel only).
    ResourceReservationRepository
     
    ResourceService
     
    ResourceSummaryDTO
    Summary of a Resource for the admin resources grid.
    ResourcesView
    Admin resources screen for the content layer beneath a Department: the resources of one of its ResourceGroups, with a green/grey online dot for MQTT devices and an occupancy overview of the reservation slots.
    RestResourceControlAdapter
    ResourceControlAdapter implementation for REST-controlled resources.
    Role
     
    RoleRepository
     
    RoleService
    CRUD service for Roles, including assignment to a Department and management of a role's owned PermissionRecords (the backing operations for the admin C/R/U/D permission matrix).
    RoleView
    Master-detail CRUD screen for Role, including the C/R/U/D permission matrix that is the point of this slice.
    SearchResult
    DTO for representing a search result.
    SearchResultType
     
    SecurityConfig
    Security for the non-Keycloak profile, split into two filter chains so the stateless REST API and the session-based Vaadin admin GUI can coexist: REST chain (@Order(1)) matches /api/** plus the OpenAPI/H2 tooling and keeps HTTP Basic auth, exactly as before. Vaadin chain (@Order(2)) is the catch-all for everything else and wires form-based login through the VaadinSecurityConfigurer, redirecting anonymous users to LoginView. Both authenticate against the same local user store (the UserService UserDetailsService + the BCrypt PasswordEncoder from PasswordConfig).
    Severity
    Severity a TelemetryRule carries.
    Skill
     
    SkillCategoriesView
    Master-detail admin CRUD screen for the SkillCategory tree that the SkillsView categories hang off: name, description and an optional parent category.
    SkillCategory
     
    SkillCategoryDTO
    Summary of a SkillCategory for the admin categories grid and the parent/category selectors.
    SkillCategoryRepository
     
    SkillController
     
    SkillGroup
     
    SkillProperty
     
    SkillPropertyNumeric
     
    SkillPropertyText
     
    SkillRecord
     
    SkillRecordProperty
     
    SkillRecordRepository
     
    SkillRepository
     
    SkillService
     
    SkillSummaryDTO
    Summary of a Skill for the admin skills grid and the category selector.
    SkillsView
    Master-detail admin CRUD screen for the global Skill master-data catalogue: name, description, keywords and an optional SkillCategory.
    SlotNotReservedException
    Thrown when a control command is to be sent to a resource, but the executing user has no active reservation (and thus no assigned slot) on that resource at the current time.
    StartProcessInstanceRequest
    What a caller has to say to start a process: which registered definition, and optionally the initial process variables the diagram needs.
    Task
    A single work item on a Blackboard.
    TaskController
    REST endpoints for tasks.
    TaskController.TaskRequest
    Request body for creating/updating a task.
    TaskController.TaskStatusRequest
    Request body for a task status change.
    TaskRepository
     
    TaskSchedule
    A recurring task generator: on its cron cadence it creates a Task from a fixed template on the target Project's blackboard.
    TaskScheduleController
    REST API for recurring task schedules (TaskScheduleService).
    TaskScheduleDTO
    Flat, transport-safe view of a TaskSchedule.
    TaskScheduleProjectCleanup
    Removes a project's TaskSchedules when the project itself is deleted.
    TaskScheduleRepository
    Repository for TaskSchedules.
    TaskScheduleRequest
    Request body for creating or patching a TaskSchedule.
    TaskScheduleRunner
    Background poller that drives TaskScheduleService.runDueSchedules(LocalDateTime) on a fixed cadence, turning the schedule store into actual task generation.
    TaskScheduleService
    Orchestrates recurring TaskSchedules: computes their cron cadence and, when due, generates tasks from their template via TaskService.createScheduledTask(Project, String, String, int).
    TaskSchedulesView
    Master-detail admin screen for the recurring TaskSchedules of a project: a schedule fires on its cron cadence and drops a task from its template onto the project's blackboard.
    TaskService
    Manages tasks on a project's Blackboard.
    TaskService.TaskData
    Editable task fields, decoupling the service from HTTP DTOs.
    TaskService.TrackingSummary
    Aggregated time-tracking total for a task.
    TaskService.WorkSession
    One tracked work session on a task: a single start-to-stop interval.
    TaskStatus
    Lifecycle status of a Task.
    TelemetryAlarmBroadcast
    Wire form of a telemetry threshold transition, published as JSON on the MQTT alarm topic.
    TelemetryAlarmMqttBridge
    Broadcasts telemetry transitions over MQTT so dashboards and devices see alarms (raised and cleared) live.
    TelemetryOperator
    Comparison a TelemetryRule applies to an incoming numeric data point to decide whether it is in breach.
    TelemetryRule
    A monitoring rule that turns a single telemetry data point of a Resource from passive history into active alarms.
    TelemetryRuleController
    REST API for telemetry monitoring rules (TelemetryRuleService).
    TelemetryRuleDTO
    Flat, transport-safe view of a TelemetryRule.
    TelemetryRuleGuard
    In-memory guard that lets the telemetry ingest path skip the per-value rule lookup for resources that have no enabled rule at all — the overwhelmingly common case.
    TelemetryRuleRepository
    Repository for TelemetryRules.
    TelemetryRuleRequest
    Request body for creating or patching a TelemetryRule.
    TelemetryRuleService
    Evaluates TelemetryRules on the telemetry ingest path and administers them (CRUD).
    TelemetryRulesPanel
    Full-CRUD admin panel for the TelemetryRules of one Resource, embedded in the detail pane of ResourcesView.
    TelemetryState
    Persisted evaluation state of a TelemetryRule.
    TelemetryThresholdEvent
    Domain event raised by ResourceService when a TelemetryRule changes state, i.e. on the flank OK→ALARM or ALARM→OK.
    TimeSpan
     
    TimeSpan.TimeSpanType
     
    UserController
     
    UserRepository
     
    UserService
     
    UserView
    Master-detail CRUD screen for PUser.
